project_type: Single-file offline webapp (QI Intelligence Platform / STP Application)
language: JavaScript (browser, no build tools like webpack - custom build script)
build_system: Custom Node.js build script (build-standalone.js) that inlines all vendor libs, app modules, CSS and textures into one HTML file. No webpack/bundler.
test_framework: Custom Node.js tests using jsdom: test.js (unit), brain.test.js (brain analyzer), smoke.js (full headless boot + 735+ assertions). Playwright for E2E (verify-upload.mjs).
verification_instructions: 1. npm test (runs test.js + brain.test.js + smoke.js). 2. node build-standalone.js. 3. node verify-standalone.js.
snapshot_or_generated_files: qi-webapp/dist/STP-Application.html is the generated standalone build (committed separately after source changes).
environment_constraints: Open internet available. Node.js v22 installed. Playwright available for E2E tests.
contribution_requirements: Source commits first, then rebuild dist and commit dist separately. All smoke tests must pass. The app is CLICK-ONLY (no free-text/number inputs in data views). File size under 6MB for standalone HTML is acceptable.
key_patterns: Vendor libs go in qi-webapp/vendor/<name>/*.min.js. Build script reads them in order from VENDOR array and inlines as <script> tags. App modules are IIFE/global style (window.QIBrain, window.QIStore, etc). The upload handler is in js/ui.js in the AFTER.brain function (line ~3343). The file input accept attribute is in the HTML template also in ui.js (line ~3242). Mammoth.js uses window.mammoth global. pdf.js legacy sets globalThis.pdfjsLib but also has ESM export statements that must be stripped for <script> tag use. The worker code must be inlined as a Blob URL.
relevant_files: qi-webapp/js/ui.js (file upload handler at line ~3371, accept attribute at line ~3242)
qi-webapp/smoke.js (headless tests - needs new assertions for DOCX/PDF routing)
qi-webapp/verify-upload.mjs (E2E upload test - needs new DOCX/PDF assertions)
directory_structure: qi-webapp/ is the app root. vendor/ has chartjs/ and three/. js/ has all app modules. css/ has styles. dist/ has the built standalone HTML. samples/ has test project descriptions. textures/ has earth images for the 3D globe.
